game_name: Low G Man: The Low Gravity Man

special_mechanics.name: Low Gravity Jump
special_mechanics.description: Protagonist's signature high-powered jumping ability that reaches three screen-heights at maximum power. Inspired by John Carter of Mars concept.

physics_values.notes: Qualitative descriptor only; exact pixel/subpixel values not documented

special_mechanics.name: Freeze Ray Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Primary weapon that freezes enemies without dealing damage. Frozen enemies must be stabbed with extending spear from top or bottom.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. No precise physics values documented in available sources. Jump height described qualitatively as reaching 'three screen-heights.' Character movement noted as 'slow' by retrospective reviewers. Game criticized for 'jerky background scrolling' and 'choppy animations' in contemporary reviews.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Low G Man article
Wikipedia - Low G Man: The Low Gravity Man
